response.global_analysis: Confirmed the video contains spoken dialogue from VTuber Yuzuki Choco discussing her new song 'Kimi no Byoushin' and upcoming content. As correctly noted in the reference JSON, there is no vocal music/singing in this segment. I have transcribed and translated the spoken dialogue with precise timestamps tied to her vocalizations. I also included relevant credit text from the outro sequence as per the secondary priority.

subtitles.original: はい！ということで、みんなどうだったかな？
subtitles.english: Alright! So, how was it, everyone?

subtitles.original: 今回の新曲「キミの秒針」は
subtitles.english: My new song this time, "Kimi no Byoushin,"

subtitles.original: shidhoの魔王様が作詞、
subtitles.english: features lyrics by shidho's Demon Lord,

subtitles.original: そして、美明亜津様が作曲、編曲、
subtitles.english: and composition and arrangement by Mimegumi Atsu-sama,

subtitles.original: そして編曲にはなんと、加藤嵩之様も加わっていただきました！
subtitles.english: and for the arrangement, Takayuki Kato-sama even joined us!

subtitles.original: いや、今回は
subtitles.english: Well, this time,

subtitles.original: ボイスドラマ連動企画の第一弾として
subtitles.english: as the first part of a voice drama tie-in project,

subtitles.original: ストーリー全体のね、テーマソングを担うような、多岐にわたる楽曲に仕上がっております！
subtitles.english: it's a multifaceted track serving as the theme song for the whole story!

subtitles.original: まぁドラマの鍵となるね、「秒針」というメタファーにも要注目してください！
subtitles.english: Please also pay close attention to the "second hand" metaphor, a key to the drama!

subtitles.original: shidhoさんだけではなく、この後ね、豪華アーティストの皆様にも
subtitles.english: Not just shidho-san, but many other wonderful artists

subtitles.original: たくさん書いていただいたので、皆様リリースお楽しみに！
subtitles.english: wrote for us afterwards, so please look forward to the release!

subtitles.original: こちらの「キミの秒針」は、各音楽サイトは、ちょっと間が空いちゃうんだけど、
subtitles.english: "Kimi no Byoushin" will be on various music sites—though there's a bit of a gap—

subtitles.original: 3月15日の0時から配信予定でございます！
subtitles.english: starting at midnight on March 15th!

subtitles.original: まぁちょっと公開まで時間が空くから、それまでこの配信、
subtitles.english: Since there's some time until the release, until then,

subtitles.original: 何度も見返してみてくださーい！聴き込んでね！
subtitles.english: please watch this stream over and over! Listen to it a lot!

subtitles.original: そしてそして、MVもね、ちょっと後日公開なので、
subtitles.english: And also, the MV will be released at a later date,

subtitles.original: 楽しみにしててくださーい！
subtitles.english: so please look forward to it!

subtitles.original: ということで、今日のちょこの生誕ライブはどうだったかな？
subtitles.english: So, how was Choco's birthday live today?

subtitles.original: まぁこの後はすぐに、ちょっとね、冒頭最初の方でお披露目した
subtitles.english: Well, right after this, as I revealed at the very beginning,

subtitles.original: ノエルちゃんとラミィちゃんとの3人の「初恋大戦争」の
subtitles.english: the three of us—Noel, Lamy, and I—will have the

subtitles.original: MV公開があって、
subtitles.english: MV release of "Hatsukoi Daisensou,"

subtitles.original: その後、メン限でちょっとライブと撮影会の続きとか
subtitles.english: and after that, in the members-only stream, we'll continue with the live and a photo session,

subtitles.original: ちょっとね、メン限でしか見れないシチュエーションドラマとかやるので、
subtitles.english: and I'll be doing situation dramas that you can only see there,

subtitles.original: ぜひぜひ気になる人は見に行ってください！
subtitles.english: so if you're interested, please come and watch!

subtitles.original: それではまた後でお会いしましょう！
subtitles.english: Well then, I'll see you again later!

subtitles.original: おつかれーとー、はむっ！
subtitles.english: Otsu-kareto, hamu!

subtitles.original: 出演：癒月ちょこ、白銀ノエル、雪花ラミィ
subtitles.english: Cast: Yuzuki Choco, Shirogane Noel, Yukihana Lamy

subtitles.original: アキ・ローゼンタール、ロボ子さん、風真いろは、不知火フレア
subtitles.english: Aki Rosenthal, Roboco-san, Kazama Iroha, Shiranui Flare

subtitles.original: サムネイル：フジモリ / ロゴ：関方あさぎり
subtitles.english: Thumbnail: Fujimori / Logo: Sekigata Asagiri

subtitles.original: 映像制作：Alvitoo20, かねふぉら, 吐水天, Hate, Meira, TARO...
subtitles.english: Video Production: Alvitoo20, kanefora, Hate, Meira, TARO...

subtitles.english: Direction: SHIG / Choreography: FreeM / Music: VESSEL LIFE LLC

subtitles.english: Production: COVER Corp. STUDIO / SPECIAL THANKS: Choco-mate
